data.raceName: GREYHOUNDS MAKE FAST FRIENDS DASH PBD
data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. REVOLVING DOOR is coming off a 8 length fifth but in a fast 17.19 at this track over 295m. Does drop down in class today from recent racing. Has the ability and expected to go close. 5. DIAMOND ARCHIE has been beaten for early speed lately, last time finishing seventh (23.41) in a Class 2 at Ascot Park. Better than last start and can bounce back. 3. VIDA VIKKERS was a last start winner (17.32) from Box 3 at this track. Has a solid record from this box including two wins and a minor placing. Steps up in class but is capable of going well again. 8. BACK CHAT BAILEY is a last-start placegetter out of the same box - worth considering. Is backing up quickly after racing on Wednesday.","runners":[2,5,3,8],"exclusive":false}
